scenes.title: Title Card
scenes.editIntent: Open with a cinematic title card for FleetOps AI Command Center. Position the story as a transformation from late-night reactive fleet management to real-time operational control for Uber and Sprinter van operations in Michigan.

blocks.text: This is not just another dashboard.
It is an operations command center for a fleet that cannot afford surprises.

scenes.title: The Problem
scenes.editIntent: Show the current state: manual operations, unknown issues, late-night calls, and the owner sleeping only 3 to 5 hours because there is no governance system. Visually contrast what appears calm with what is actually happening beneath the surface.

blocks.text: But the system is blind until something breaks.

scenes.title: Normal Operations
scenes.editIntent: Show the FleetOps command center at rest with active drivers, event stream, healthy fleet metrics, and AI operator monitoring. Establish confidence and baseline before the incident occurs.

blocks.text: This is what a controlled operation looks like.
Drivers, events, and alerts all visible in one place.

scenes.title: Incident Detected
scenes.editIntent: Trigger a high-risk driver incident. Make the alert feel urgent and specific: long inactivity, restaurant parking lot, police contact. This should emotionally mirror the real incident Adrian described.

blocks.text: The system does not wait for a midnight phone call.
It detects the event as an incident.

scenes.title: AI Diagnosis
scenes.editIntent: Have the AI operator explain likely root cause, business impact, and recommended actions. This is the differentiation scene where FleetOps becomes decision support, not passive reporting.

blocks.text: The alert is only the beginning.
The real value is diagnosis, impact, and the next best action.

scenes.title: Playbook Execution
scenes.editIntent: Show a deterministic incident playbook executing step by step: contact attempt, suspension, vehicle reassignment, compliance logging, owner notification. Sell the idea of governed operations.

blocks.text: The incident gets contained the same way every time.

scenes.title: System Recovery
scenes.editIntent: Return to the command center view after the incident is contained. Show one driver suspended, another vehicle reassigned, and the fleet stabilized. Make the after-state feel calm, governed, and trustworthy.

blocks.text: The goal is not just to detect problems.
It is to recover fast, contain risk, and keep the fleet running.

scenes.title: Operational Impact
scenes.editIntent: Close with the operational and human impact: faster detection, faster response, fewer sleepless nights, and an owner finally running a logistics operation through a command center rather than reactive calls.

blocks.text: Less chaos, faster response, and a system that lets the owner sleep again.
